item1.title: Instant verification
item1.desc: Anyone scans the QR Code and sees the athlete's full history in 0.3 seconds.

item2.title: Cryptographically immutable
item2.desc: Unique SHA-256 hash per graduation. No one can alter it — not even the organization, not even us.

item3.title: Lifetime passport
item3.desc: The athlete keeps their link forever. Switch organizations, close the school — the passport remains.

mission.label: OUR MISSION
mission.heading: We build the trust infrastructure for martial arts.
mission.p1: Belts take years to earn. Hours of training, perseverance, and dedication are recorded in the body — but rarely in a place that withstands time or can be verified by anyone, anywhere in the world.
mission.p2: fightport.pro was born to change that. We created a system where every graduation becomes a permanent, encrypted, and publicly verifiable record in less than one second. No papers that get lost. No certificates that can be forged. No doubts about an athlete's journey.

problemSection.label: THE PROBLEM WE SOLVE
problemSection.heading: Paper certificates are easy to forge. Digital records are not.
problemSection.p1: The martial arts market generates billions and has millions of active practitioners. But certification of graduations still works as it did decades ago: a printed paper, a signature, and a stamp.
problemSection.p2: Competition referees, employers, other schools — anyone who needs to verify an athlete's graduation has no way to do so securely. fightport.pro solves this problem with SHA-256 cryptography and QR Codes verifiable by anyone, on any device, without needing an account or app.

s1.label: of organizations still use paper certificates with no digital backing

s2.label: of referees cannot verify graduations at competitions

s3.label: of training recorded on paper that can be lost or forged

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.heading: Simple for the organization. Definitive for the athlete.
howItWorks.p1: The organization registers its practitioners, records the graduation, and automatically generates a digital passport with a QR Code. The process takes less than two minutes. The record lasts forever.
howItWorks.p2: Each graduation receives a unique SHA-256 hash, calculated at the time of registration. Any subsequent change — even minimal — would produce a completely different hash, making tampering immediately detectable. It's the same technology used to ensure the integrity of digital financial transactions.

whoWeAre.label: WHO WE ARE
whoWeAre.heading: A Brazilian company built for national sports.
whoWeAre.p1: fightport.pro is developed by SportCombat, a company based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, focused on technology solutions for the Brazilian sports ecosystem.
whoWeAre.p2: We operate under the General Data Protection Law (LGPD) and take seriously the responsibility of safeguarding athlete information. All data is stored in secure infrastructure, encrypted in transit and at rest.
whoWeAre.p3: We are present in organizations across São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro, Curitiba, Belo Horizonte, Porto Alegre, Fortaleza, and Recife — and growing.
